allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; jobs=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['jobs']; [print\(j['name'], j['conclusion'] or j['status']\) for j in jobs]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; jobs=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['jobs']; [print\(f\\"{j['name']:40} {j['conclusion'] or j['status']}\\"\) for j in jobs]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(e['name'], '- protection_rules:', len\(e.get\('protection_rules',[]\)\)\) for e in data.get\('environments',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); checks=[c for c in d['statusCheckRollup']]; print\('State:', d['state']\); print\('MergeStatus:', d['mergeStateStatus']\); [print\(f\\"  {c.get\('name','?'\):40} {c.get\('conclusion'\) or c.get\('state'\) or c.get\('status','?'\)}\\"\) for c in checks]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('State:', d['state']\); [print\(c['name'], ':', c.get\('conclusion',''\), c.get\('state',''\), c.get\('status',''\)\) for c in d['statusCheckRollup']]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('\\n'.join\(f'{k}: {v}' for k,v in deps.items\(\) if not k.startswith\('@types'\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['name'], r['status'], r.get\('conclusion',''\)\) for r in d.get\('check_runs',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['version'], r['status'], r['rollout_percentage'], r['channel'], r['platform']\) for r in d.get\('data',[]\)]")
